instruction: I still need the budget email thread in the inbox handled today. Then review the Sydney board and calendar; right now the board still lacks the next step, and if it only needs async follow-up, leave the calendar alone, so add only what is missing, note it in a handoff file, and send bob@example.com a short update.

solution_commands: file create --path '/handoff/sydney-budget-followup.txt' --content 'Sydney budget follow-up handoff note.'
